title: cinnamomum xanthoneurum
intro: Cinnamomum xanthoneurum, also known as the rough-leaved cinnamon, is a plant species native to Australia that belongs to the laurel family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Cinnamomum xanthoneurum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Cinnamomum xanthoneurum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
